name: usaspending-gov-mcp
description: MCP server for USASpending.gov federal contract, award, subaward, recipient, agency, and federal account data.
long_description:
Queries the USASpending.gov API for federal contract and award data across all agencies. v0.3 expands the surface from 17 to 55 tools, adding FFATA subawards, recipient profile/children, agency depth (sub-agencies, federal accounts, object classes, program activities, obligations by award category), award detail rollups, transaction-level and geographic search, IDV depth, autocomplete helpers (awarding/funding agency, CFDA, glossary, recipient), reference data (award types, DEFC, glossary, submission periods), and Treasury federal accounts.

55 tools. No authentication required.

Hardened across 9 audit rounds. v0.3 added 243 tests for the new endpoints (167 offline, 76 live). All new endpoints have 10+ live tests against the production API. Origin repo for the `extra='forbid'` pydantic pattern that protects every 1102tools MCP from typo'd parameter name silent-wrong-data bugs.
